name: jana-playbook
description: An internal, single-page Next.js app for Janaagraha staff: a searchable, copy-ready guide to using Claude clearly, safely, and efficiently across policy, finance, research, and communications work. It covers data-sharing guardrails, token/context habits, a reusable prompt formula, a copy-ready profile/project instruction prompt, and team-specific prompt libraries (All Staff, Policy and Insights, Public Finance).
